## Environment Information
* **MySystem CLI Version**: (run `npx mysystem --version` or check `packages/cli/package.json`)
* **Node.js Version**: (run `node -v`)
* **Operating System**: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04)
* **Application Stack**: (e.g. Express, FastAPI, Next.js, Vite/React)
